git_context.head: 88762d276ac0cb8355c9b8c55140b656406cd07f
git_context.subject: Post-build audit Content Engine queue governance core

validation_domains.name: state_contract_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate Queue Governance Core state remains built-post-audited and non-productive.

validation_domains.name: schema_and_canonicalization_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate schema, canonicalization, stable hashing, ID and UTC timestamp behavior.

validation_domains.name: intake_and_source_type_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate allowed source types and blocked import/automation source types.

validation_domains.name: channel_routing_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate A/B/C/D routing and cross-channel contamination controls.

validation_domains.name: lifecycle_transition_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate allowed conceptual lifecycle and blocked production lifecycle states.

validation_domains.name: priority_readiness_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate priority/readiness never authorize generation, queue write or publishing.

validation_domains.name: evidence_contract_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate channel, pillar, audience, intent, risk and traceability evidence requirements.

validation_domains.name: boundary_guard_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate queue write, prompt/script generation, publishing and automation boundaries remain blocked.

validation_domains.name: sensitive_data_and_security_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate field-scoped PII/secret/path detection without technical-field false positives.

validation_domains.name: threat_model_and_risk_precedence_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate threat model coverage and execution-risk precedence before generic sensitive scan.

validation_domains.name: failure_policy_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate failed states remain fail-closed with no commit, push or productive operations.

validation_domains.name: manifest_seal_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate manifest/seal integrity, canonical JSON and next-safe-step discipline.

validation_domains.name: no_touch_and_output_scope_validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate protected roots remain untouched and validation outputs stay exact.
